steps.t: Ost Celebrant is the large fortress in south-east Parth Celebrant. Doron wishes to meet you on the bridge at Ost Celebrant.
Doron is among his men at the Field of Celebrant, atop a hill in western Parth Celebrant. You should speak with Doron once more.
Idmar is at his camp along the road in central Parth Celebrant. You should bring news of your victory to Idmar.
